description: Storage moved from Cloudflare D1/KV to versioned repo JSON files read at build time. Weekly collection runs as a scheduled GitHub Action that commits data/. Editorial approval becomes pull-request review. Data volume (weekly, single-editor) does not justify a database; git provides immutable history, audit trail, and backups.

Sentry dropped. SPEC §4 named Sentry for client error tracking, but §11 guarantees no third-party script loads and GDPR-compliance by default. The privacy guarantee takes precedence: no error-tracking script ships. SPEC §4's Sentry line is superseded by §11.
